<!-- Thanks for contributing! A short description and a checklist below is plenty for most PRs. -->

## Summary

<!-- 1-3 sentences. What does this change, and why? -->

## Type of change

<!-- Check one. -->

- [ ] Bug fix (non-breaking)
- [ ] New feature (non-breaking)
- [ ] Breaking change
- [ ] Refactor / internal cleanup
- [ ] Docs / examples
- [ ] Build / CI / tooling

## Checklist

- [ ] Tests added or updated (if behavior changed)
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] `pnpm build` passes
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated under `[Unreleased]` (for user-visible changes)
- [ ] Docs / READMEs updated (if public API changed)

## Related issues

<!-- e.g. "Closes #123", "Refs #456". Optional. -->
